backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented bilingual (EN/FR) features including language switcher UI, language state management, and translations for Home, For Farmers, and Contact pages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing the bilingual React application structure with language context, translated pages, and MORSHID branding.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including background, foreground, primary, secondary, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and script tag loading the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component configuring TanStack Router with three routes (Home, For Farmers, Contact) wrapped in QueryClient, InternetIdentity, and Language providers.
frontend/src/components/LogoPopup.tsx: Modal popup component displaying translated 'With MORSHID' message with backdrop overlay and close button.
frontend/src/components/MorshidButton.ts: Custom button component wrapping shadcn Button with text-base size, rounded-lg styling, and hover shadow effects.
frontend/src/components/MorshidCard.tsx: Custom card component wrapping shadcn Card with white background, shadow-md, rounded-lg corners, and optional colored top border.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component with dark green background displaying MORSHID logo, contact info (Rabat, Morocco, email, phone), and Caffeine attribution.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky header with MORSHID logo, translated navigation links with active highlighting, and EN/FR language switcher buttons.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppFloating: Fixed bottom-right floating button linking to WhatsApp with green background and translated aria-label.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context providing language state (en/fr), setLanguage function, and translation lookup with comprehensive translations for all website content while keeping MORSHID name unchanged.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom MORSHID brand colors (#25D366 green theme) defined in OKLCH color space, including light/dark mode variables and global styling for buttons and typography.
frontend/src/layouts/SiteLayout.tsx: Main layout component that wraps pages with SiteHeader, SiteFooter, and WhatsAppFloatingButton, using TanStack Router's Outlet for nested routing.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page displaying three communication channels (WhatsApp, Email, Phone) in card layout with localized content and call-to-action buttons.
frontend/src/pages/ForFarmersPage.tsx: Farmers-focused landing page with hero section, four service cards (crop care, disease detection, market info, supplies), and FAQ accordion, all with localized content.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main homepage featuring hero section with MORSHID logo popup, four pillars cards (advice, security, selling, supplies), how-it-works section, and WhatsApp CTA, all with i18n support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the design system with OKLCH color variables, custom Morshid brand colors (#25D366 primary green), extended theme tokens for UI components (sidebar, card, chart, etc.), container settings, border radius variables, and animation keyframes for accordions.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting the MORSHID website with 3 pages (Home, For Farmers, Contact), bilingual English/French support, architectural constraints (sticky header, floating WhatsApp button, #25D366 brand color), known styling inconsistencies to fix, and a comprehensive list of implemented features with requirement IDs and versions.
